detailed model output for Uranus's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
this model assumes the composite wind profile from Sromovsky et al. (2015, Icarus 258) Table 6.
mu=sin(phi), phi [radians], and lat_deg [degress] refer to planetocentric latitude; lat_pg_deg gives planetographic latitude in degrees.
